heading: Membership
label: 150903 Membership

children.heading: .—Eligibility
children.label: a .—Eligibility
children.text: Except as provided in this chapter, eligibility for membership in the corporation and the rights and privileges of members are as provided in the bylaws.

children.heading: .—Voting
children.label: b .—Voting
children.text: Each member (except an honorary or associate member) has one vote on each matter submitted to a vote at a meeting of the members.
